rationale: The response explicitly brakes in the first sentence, names the repeated pattern across盖章、税率、交付日期、质保条款, and moves the diagnosis upstream to missing pre-inquiry validation rather than insufficient fields. Although it provides a temporary emergency field, it frames that as non-default and requires structural consolidation into a pre-check/source-of-truth checklist, so it avoids the fail pattern of simply adding the next field without triage.
